mapper.select: SELECT sr.id, sr.user_id AS userId, sr.resource_id AS resourceId, sr.duration, sr.started_at AS startedAt, sr.ended_at AS endedAt, COALESCE(r.title, '未知视频') AS title FROM study_records sr LEFT JOIN study_resources r ON r.id = sr.resource_id WHERE sr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sr.started_at DESC
SELECT FROM study_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY started_at DESC

SELECT m.id as userId, m.username as memberName, m.student_id as studentId, COALESCE(SUM(sr.duration), 0) as totalDuration, COUNT(sr.id) as studyCount FROM members m LEFT JOIN study_records sr ON m.id = sr.user_id GROUP BY m.id, m.username, m.student_id ORDER BY totalDuration DESC

SELECT m.id as userId, m.username as memberName, m.student_id as studentId, COALESCE(SUM(sr.duration), 0) as totalDuration, COUNT(sr.id) as studyCount FROM members m LEFT JOIN study_records sr ON m.id = sr.user_id WHERE m.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') GROUP BY m.id, m.username, m.student_id ORDER BY totalDuration DESC
